default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Strapi and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, performance, and integration pages.](https://fathom.video/share/D3EY24aLnw5QMH6Xqy942GEMtyoTMHuC?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance remains strong with 111 articles published, generating \~130,000 clicks](https://fathom.video/share/D3EY24aLnw5QMH6Xqy942GEMtyoTMHuC?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [Integration of Kappa AI for up-to-date Strapi 5 code snippets in articles to be discussed with CTO](https://fathom.video/share/D3EY24aLnw5QMH6Xqy942GEMtyoTMHuC?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [New image templates for articles created, pending refinement with Strapi's icon library](https://fathom.video/share/D3EY24aLnw5QMH6Xqy942GEMtyoTMHuC?tab=summary&timestamp=655.0)
  - [Publishing cadence set: 1-week review period for new drafts before publication](https://fathom.video/share/D3EY24aLnw5QMH6Xqy942GEMtyoTMHuC?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [111 articles published to date](https://fathom.video/share/D3EY24aLnw5QMH6Xqy942GEMtyoTMHuC?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [\~130,000 clicks generated, slightly lower than last week (attributed to meeting day shift)](https://fathom.video/share/D3EY24aLnw5QMH6Xqy942GEMtyoTMHuC?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [1,800 clicks per week on average](https://fathom.video/share/D3EY24aLnw5QMH6Xqy942GEMtyoTMHuC?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [Performance details available in the "performance" tab for individual articles](https://fathom.video/share/D3EY24aLnw5QMH6Xqy942GEMtyoTMHuC?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### Content Quality Improvements

  - [Theo identified inconsistencies in article titles and meta descriptions (e.g., "Top 10" vs. "Top 5")](https://fathom.video/share/D3EY24aLnw5QMH6Xqy942GEMtyoTMHuC?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Outdated content and external links (some dating back to 2018) need updating](https://fathom.video/share/D3EY24aLnw5QMH6Xqy942GEMtyoTMHuC?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Suggestion to integrate Kappa AI (used in Strapi docs) to generate up-to-date Strapi 5 code snippets](https://fathom.video/share/D3EY24aLnw5QMH6Xqy942GEMtyoTMHuC?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)

### Image Templates for Articles

  - [New templates created following Strapi's brand book](https://fathom.video/share/D3EY24aLnw5QMH6Xqy942GEMtyoTMHuC?tab=summary&timestamp=655.0)
  - [Feedback: reduce text, incorporate icons, and adjust to 16:9 ratio for SEO-friendliness](https://fathom.video/share/D3EY24aLnw5QMH6Xqy942GEMtyoTMHuC?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)
  - [Victor to provide Strapi's icon library for integration into templates](https://fathom.video/share/D3EY24aLnw5QMH6Xqy942GEMtyoTMHuC?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)

### Integration Pages and Publishing Schedule

  - [19 drafts currently, with 10 more articles to be uploaded this week](https://fathom.video/share/D3EY24aLnw5QMH6Xqy942GEMtyoTMHuC?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)
  - [Theo plans to publish second-tier integration pages by Friday](https://fathom.video/share/D3EY24aLnw5QMH6Xqy942GEMtyoTMHuC?tab=summary&timestamp=895.0)
  - [New publishing cadence: 1-week review period for newly uploaded drafts](https://fathom.video/share/D3EY24aLnw5QMH6Xqy942GEMtyoTMHuC?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)

### Partner Collaboration

  - [React Admin provided edits for their integration page](https://fathom.video/share/D3EY24aLnw5QMH6Xqy942GEMtyoTMHuC?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
  - [Emphasis on including backlinks to integration pages in partner collaborations](https://fathom.video/share/D3EY24aLnw5QMH6Xqy942GEMtyoTMHuC?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Plan to reach out to top 10 performing integrations and other key partners for backlinking opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/D3EY24aLnw5QMH6Xqy942GEMtyoTMHuC?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Paul to meet with Daniel (CTO) on Thursday to discuss Kappa AI integration and content updates](https://fathom.video/share/D3EY24aLnw5QMH6Xqy942GEMtyoTMHuC?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [Andrej to revise image templates using Strapi's icon library](https://fathom.video/share/D3EY24aLnw5QMH6Xqy942GEMtyoTMHuC?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
  - [Theo to publish second-tier integration pages by Friday](https://fathom.video/share/D3EY24aLnw5QMH6Xqy942GEMtyoTMHuC?tab=summary&timestamp=895.0)
  - [Team to implement new 1-week review period for newly uploaded drafts](https://fathom.video/share/D3EY24aLnw5QMH6Xqy942GEMtyoTMHuC?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)
  - [Paul to work with Mark on reaching out to partners for backlinking opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/D3EY24aLnw5QMH6Xqy942GEMtyoTMHuC?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
  - [Golzar to start new email chain with Caroline regarding React Admin integration page edits](https://fathom.video/share/D3EY24aLnw5QMH6Xqy942GEMtyoTMHuC?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)

action_items.description: Ask designer to send icon library to GrowthX for use in blog post images
Publish second tier integration pages by Friday
Review React Admin edits, incorporate backlink to integration page, finalize for publication
Work with Mark to get integration pages backlinked from partner websites, starting with top 10 performing integrations
Join call with Daniel tomorrow re: Kappa AI integration, follow up with recap
